author: codex-gpt5

patch.value: Warn on global service and renderer override footguns

GitHub issue #96: registerService("output_format") and registerRenderer overrides can silently replace output for every command, while extension doctor still reports the extension healthy. Duplicate check: pm search for service renderer override output_format corrupt output doctor warning found no open direct duplicate. Desired outcome: extension doctor/runtime should surface unsafe global override behavior and docs should explain pass-through/null fallback contracts.

message: Track GitHub #96 from gh issue audit.

author: codex-broad-audit-20260602
message: Implement diagnostics/docs for unsafe service and renderer override behavior as part of pm-lwtx audit.

value.author: codex-extension-lane-20260602
value.text: Audit lane start (codex-extension-lane-20260602): checking extension service/renderer override diagnostics against GitHub issue #96 under pm-lwtx. Scope: registerService/registerRenderer, extension doctor, activation metadata, warnings, docs, tests. No claim/release; findings-only unless tiny isolated doc/test typo.

value.author: codex-extension-lane-20260602
value.text: Final audit findings for GitHub #96: confirmed current behavior in isolated temp tracker. Service-only override registerService('output_format', () => ({format:'toon'})) corrupts list-open --json and extension doctor --json to {format:'toon'} with exit 0. Renderer-only override registerRenderer('json', ...) corrupts both commands to the renderer JSON with exit 0. Root locations: src/core/extensions/loader.ts:1644 registerService and :1661 registerRenderer store global overrides; src/core/extensions/loader.ts:2113 treats output_format as chained and suppresses service collision warnings; src/core/output/output.ts:227/:247 applies service then renderer globally; src/cli/commands/extension.ts:1488/:1582 reports counts but no unsafe-output diagnostics. Docs gap: docs/EXTENSIONS.md:266 and docs/SDK.md:167/:446 mention APIs/narrow overrides but not the pass-through/null fallback contract; RendererOverride is typed as string at src/core/extensions/extension-types.ts:248 while #96 expects null fallback. Minimal fix shape: doctor/runtime warning code(s) for unsafe global output_format and renderer registrations, native/no-extension-output rendering path for doctor so doctor remains parseable, docs with safe context.payload/null examples, and focused tests for service-only, renderer-only, and doctor parseability. Commands run: gh issue view 96 --json; pm context/search/list-open/list-in-progress/show; pnpm build (passed before shared edits); isolated temp repros via node dist/cli.js; pm health --check-only --summary --json (passed). Focused test command attempted but blocked by unrelated shared edit TS2353 in src/core/extensions/item-fields.ts known_fields/PmCliErrorContext.

value.note: Doctor warnings for global output service and renderer overrides
Remediation for global output override footguns
SDK renderer type permits null fallback
Native-render doctor output to avoid corruption by diagnosed output overrides
Doctor warning coverage for global output overrides

value.author: codex-broad-audit-20260602
value.text: Evidence: extension doctor now reports global output service/renderer override warnings, doctor output uses native rendering to remain parseable while diagnosing output overrides, renderer null fallback is supported in SDK/runtime, docs and starter example updated. Passed linked test: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts tests/unit/output.spec.ts (74 tests).

value.author: codex-broad-audit-20260602
value.text: Evidence: extension doctor now reports global output service/renderer override warnings, doctor output uses native rendering to remain parseable while diagnosing output overrides, renderer null fallback is supported in SDK/runtime, docs and starter example updated. Passed linked test: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts tests/unit/output.spec.ts (74 tests).

patch.value: Implemented diagnostics and safe fallback contracts for global output override footguns.
